title: Black Knife [DELTARUNE]
description: This mod adds the roaring knight's sword because i couldnt find one in this version.
body:
THIS WAS MADE WITH MCREATOR.
The sword in the mod is crafted with a netherite ingot, a nether star, a ender dragon egg, and the sculk catalyst (forgot the name), if you break a block or press right click while holding it, it will create a explosion, this is a overpowered weapon too, intended use as a final weapon.
